article_meta.title: Politics Why Minnesotans Still Haven't Backed Down From Fighting ICE It's freezing

reasoning: Some solid catches from the author’s own prose (e.g., “the bastards,” “secret police…abduct…disappear,” emotional lede, and “ICE…has killed…may kill again”) with no attribution violations. However, it misses multiple clear author-level bias instances and includes a questionable, non-quoted meta item (“entire article focus”) with a debatable label.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s narrative voice; no quoted/attributed language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One item is overbroad/structural (“entire article focus”) and uses a debatable type; others are defensible bias instances.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several strong author-prose biases: e.g., “entire city is against you,” “the line between journalism and pornography,” “ICE atrocities,” “ravenous national audience,” and “police…stood menacingly.”
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Mostly reasonable labels; however, ‘Bias by Story Choice and Placement’ is misapplied (closer to Bias by Omission) and the meta selection lacks a specific text snippet.
